caption: Saturday 12mi with the Pacers. 8:12 avg. Knee held. Cozy Corner after. #lakefrontpacers #halfmarathontraining
Bib pickup. Three Sundays out. Goal: 1:42:00. The legs decide on race day. #lakefronthalfmarathon
Sunday recovery + jigsaw. The puzzle is older than my caseload. Both nearing resolution. #wickerpark
Sister birthday lead-up. Avec on the books. She still doesn't know about the Garmin. #naomibirthday
True crime + chamomile. Trial prep doesn't write itself. #publicdefender
Tuesday speed at the track. 400s on repeat until the legs forget what comfort feels like. #lakefronttrack
Friday Big Star tradition. Al pastor, elote, one IPA, the sister. #wickerpark #bigstar
Knee cleared. Strength block stays. Race day stays Nov 1. #patellofemoral #stillracing
New Brooks. Old ones now relegated to the shoe rack of shame. Four pairs deep. #fleetfeet
Loyola Law alumni event. The pasta was punctual. The speeches were not.
Cookies en route from Indy. Mom keeps the supply chain running. #denisemom
CARPLS Saturday intake. Three hours, six clients, four wins. #legalaid
Dad birthday call. Same vinyl playing in the background since 1991. #rolandroth
Lakefront Trail at 6:15am. Worth the alarm. Almost. #tempo
Pastoral courthouse lunch. Turkey, brie, baguette. Engineered for one-handed eating between hearings.
Bookshelf reshuffle. Truman Capote next to Stevenson next to Saunders. The shelf has opinions. #bookstagram
Cold brew + case prep at 1am. The 2-AM brain is the productive one. Filed at 1:48. #publicdefender
Saturday brunch reset. Veggie omelet, black coffee, the Sunday Times read on Saturday because that's how I am. #cozycorner
